author: the123 animation review
title: Doesn’t work  for album art on Spotify
content: Never mind I fixed it. It was the file

author: uhhhhwtf
title: mismanages its internal storage
content:
very poor file management, bulks up storage space and deletes your actual files out of external applications if you try to remove them.
its a good app but this needs attention.

author: m1dmk
title: Fake FAQ
content: No"external file" selection for music have imported from itunes into phone music app

author: Sonead_
title: Does what it needs to
content: Love this app, it gives files so many tags like the title, year, genre, and the Album cover which is why i chose this app specifically.

author: supersammy09
title: Awful ads
content: App does the job but I did not appreciate getting unskippable adult ads.

author: Percival 90
title: Not for music library
content: I wanted something to correct some mp3 tags in the music library on my phone. This app couldn’t see them nor navigate to the songs. The support offered on the web on how to use it is poor. It seems to want to work with cloud folders. I don’t use them for music so this no use to me.

author: Diojoswel
title: I love it! I don’t want to delete it I LOVE IT
content: This is a beautiful app great job

author: PengY27
title: Pretty good tbh
content: There are some better tag editors but this is definitely the best one one Apple

author: GrantDerepas
title: Everything except playing music
content:
I was looking for something I could use to go through my music library while on the go, listening to tracks and adding tags/ratings to help me better find tracks later while DJing. 

This app has great controls for editing the tags with more cloud integrations that you can shake a stick at but no way to actually listen to the songs. I would have thought that function was a given.
